---
title: "Puslinch"
---

## Puslinch

**Type:** place

### About

Puslinch, near Newton Ferrars in south Devon, was the home of the Rev. John Yonge, cousin of CMY\'s father, his wife Alethea Henrietta Bargus, half-sister of CMY\'s mother, and their ten children.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
